question: Create a `Movie` class with `title` (string), `director` (string), and `releaseYear` (int). Implement a constructor where `director` and `releaseYear` have default values (e.g., 'Unknown' and 2000), allowing movies to be created with just a title.

test_cases.expected:
Movie 1 Details:
Title: Inception, Director: Christopher Nolan, Release Year: 2010

Movie 2 Details (before invalid year set):
Title: Dune, Director: Unknown, Release Year: 2000
Movie 2 Details (after invalid year set):
Title: Dune, Director: Unknown, Release Year: -500

Movie 3 Details:
Title: Pulp Fiction, Director: Quentin Tarantino, Release Year: 2000

errors: The Movie class does not validate the `releaseYear` in its constructor or `setReleaseYear` method. This allows arbitrary and potentially illogical integer values (e.g., negative years, years far in the future) to be stored, making the class less robust against invalid data input and potentially leading to inconsistent state.
